mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.post_id AS postId, c.parent_id AS parentId, c.author_id AS authorId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), NULLIF(u.username, ''), '社区成员') AS authorName, u.avatar AS authorAvatar, COALESCE(NULLIF(pu.nickname, ''), NULLIF(pu.username, ''), NULL) AS replyToName, c.content, c.like_count AS likeCount,
CASE WHEN cl.status = 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS liked,
FALSE AS liked,
c.create_time AS createTime FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN user_account u ON u.id = c.author_id LEFT JOIN community_comment pc ON pc.id = c.parent_id LEFT JOIN user_account pu ON pu.id = pc.author_id
LEFT JOIN community_comment_like cl ON cl.comment_id = c.id AND cl.user_id = #{userId}
WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_id, c.id) ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT id, post_id AS postId, author_id AS authorId, content, status, COALESCE(like_count, 0) AS likeCount, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM community_comment WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET like_count = COALESCE(like_count, 0) + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
UPDATE community_comment SET like_count = CASE WHEN COALESCE(like_count, 0) > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
